Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Artur Belfry]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 6''' — Artur Belfry is an Imperial Witness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 6''' — Artur Belfry is the Chronicler who Reads and records Imperial history.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 6''' — Artur is a tutor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 6''' — Artur is a Chronicler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 6''' — Artur holds a copy of Sadesthenes’ From Rising Sun to Setting Moon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 8''' — Artur provided teachings to Calder Marten.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 8''' — Artur lectured Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 19''' — Artur is a person known to Alsa.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 24''' — Artur Belfry is an Imperial Witness who wrote a confidential report for the Blackwatch.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
